## Live trading

## How to refresh this snapshot

```bash
ssh root@167.71.24.86 'find /root/agent -maxdepth 3 -type f'
ssh root@167.71.24.86 'systemctl list-units --type=service --state=active | grep -iE "trad|canary|bot|l99"'
ssh root@167.71.24.86 'sha256sum /root/agent/canary/canary_strategy.py'
```
